author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/tools/accumulator.rs: to_openai_tool_calls_json now canonicalizes arguments via Self::canonicalize_arguments. Pre-fix the raw streamed input_json was embedded verbatim with no validation: (a) empty streams emitted '""' (invalid JSON); (b) truncated streams propagated to convert_messages_to_anthropic where unwrap_or_else(|_| json!({})) silently replaced them with {} and dropped the model's intent. Post-fix: empty/whitespace -> canonical '{}'; valid JSON round-trips through serde_json::to_string for byte-stable output; malformed JSON collapses to '{}' with a tracing::warn! so the corruption is observable. Raw fragment remains accessible via finalize_tool_calls. Added 4 regression tests (empty, quoted-string, nested-object, malformed). Tests: 1338 pass (baseline 1334 + 4 new). cargo clippy --lib --tests -- -D warnings exits 0. Out of scope: index-cap and finalize() JSON-closure validation — those touch the OpenAI->internal ToolCallAccumulator path; separate ticket if still needed.
